title: Yoqm@`am #3361
definition:
Jokmeam = "gathered by the people"

 1) a city of refuge in Ephraim given to the Kohathite Levites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jokmeam = "gathered by the people"

 1) a city of refuge in Ephraim given to the Kohathite Levites

    NASB:  let the people be established, a city in N. Isr.
